metadata.name: Coordinate with a Third-Party Security Vendor

description: A large music festival requires additional security beyond the in-house team, so a third-party security firm has been hired.

nodes.task_description: Share the event's security plan and post orders with the vendor's management.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent securely sends the security plan documents to the vendor.

nodes.task_description: Obtain a list of all vendor staff who will be working the event for credentialing.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent receives the staff list from the vendor.

nodes.task_description: Arrange a pre-event briefing between the in-house security manager and the vendor's on-site supervisor.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent schedules a meeting to align on protocols and chain of command.
